manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Minimum Chiller Lift at Minimum Load
manual_entries.summary: For each chiller, the minimum allowable lift at minimum load should follow manufacturer recommendations and be used to maintain acceptable head pressure during condenser-water reset control.

structured_payload.rated_value: LIFTminX at minimum load per manufacturer recommendation
structured_payload.measurement_context: difference between condenser water return temperature and chilled water supply temperature

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: LIFTminX is the minimum allowable lift at minimum load for Chiller X and should follow manufacturer recommendations.
chunk.text_excerpt: minimum allowable lift at minimum load for chiller x

evidence.evidence_text: The sequence requires identifying the minimum allowable lift at minimum load for each chiller, LIFTminX, from manufacturer recommendations, and uses that value to support condenser-water temperature reset and minimum head-pressure control.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Chiller Design Capacity
manual_entries.summary: Chiller design capacity should be defined as QchX in tons for each chiller stage and plant design sequence.

structured_payload.measurement_context: design load capacity for Chiller X

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: QchX is the design capacity of Chiller X, in tons.
chunk.text_excerpt: qchx design capacity of chiller x in tons

evidence.evidence_text: The chilled-water plant design information defines QchX as the design capacity of Chiller X, expressed in tons.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf
